issues.title: feat: add a CLI verbosity flag
issues.body:
Add a verbosity flag to the command line entry point in `src/cli.ts`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `src/cli.ts` accepts a --verbose flag
- [ ] verbosity is threaded into the logger call

issues.title: feat: add a rotating logger
issues.body:
Add a rotating file logger in `src/logger.ts`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `src/logger.ts` rotates at 10MB

issues.title: feat: add an in-memory cache
issues.body:
Add a small in-memory cache in `src/cache.ts`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `src/cache.ts` evicts least-recently-used entries
